title: Marketplace Manager - Amazon India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Amazon India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amazon India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
